---
title: "The whole game practice"
subtitle: "Adjust the YAML each week when doing a new exercise"
author: Morgan Brucks
date: 2026-06-24
image: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---


```{r}
message("First time using the insert code chunk button!")

x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```
